subcodes.first_line: This Book proclaimeth the truth and enjoineth upon men righteousness and justice, from the presence of One Who is All-Knowing, All-Wise, that they may know the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یامر الناس بالبر و العدل من لدن علیم حکیم لیعرفوا سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God
